title: Support  - Device with device connected
scenario: Device Support screen shows paired device list and detail modal with device info and "Go" button for sending to Support
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected to the phone.
3. From the Home screen, tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
6. Observe the screen displays the question 'What device are you having issues with?' along with a list of all paired Poly devices.
7. Tap on one of the listed paired devices.
8. Observe that a modal dialog opens showing detailed device information including: Device name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, HW Revision, and Last Connected.
9. Verify that a 'Go' button is present in the modal.
expected: The Support > Device screen shows the question 'What device are you having issues with?' and a list of paired devices. Tapping a device opens a modal with detailed device info (Device name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, HW Revision, Last Connected) and a 'Go' button to send the info to Support.
